qa_pairs.question: What is the base image used to bootstrap the FEniCS Singularity container in this recipe?
qa_pairs.answer: The FEniCS Singularity container uses `docker` as its bootstrap method, deriving its base from `quay.io/fenicsproject/stable:latest`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the first system commands executed within the `%post` section of the FEniCS Singularity recipe?
qa_pairs.answer: The first system commands executed within the `%post` section are `sudo apt-get -qq update` and `sudo apt-get -y upgrade`.

qa_pairs.question: Which Python-related packages are installed at the beginning of the `%post` section in the FEniCS Singularity recipe?
qa_pairs.answer: The Python-related packages installed are `python-bitstring`, `python3-bitstring`, `python-certifi`, `python3-certifi`, `python-cryptography`, `python3-cryptography`, `python-cycler`, `python3-cycler`, `cython`, and `cython3`.
